properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 C3 V4 V5 C3 V4 V6 V4

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Almighty God, my Redeemer My hiding place, my safe refuge No other name like Jesus No power can stand against You

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: My feet are planted on this rock And I will not be shaken My hope it comes from You alone My Lord and my salvation

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: Your praise is always on my lips Your word is living in my heart And I will praise You with a new song My soul will bless You, Lord

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: You fill my life with greater joy Yes, I delight myself in You And I will praise You with a new song My soul will bless You, Lord

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: When I am weak, you make me strong When I'm poor, I know I'm rich For in the power of Your name All things are possible All things are possible

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: All things are possible All things are possible Your praise is always on my lips Your word is living in my heart
